title: Vanilla+ [Vulkan]
description: My modpack is aiming to make Minecraft more efficient by using Vulkan while making your Minecraft experience much better by adding a collection of vanilla plus mods and texture packs to enhance your minecraft experience while retaining that Vanilla feel!!
body:
# Vanilla+ [Vulkan]

> Now with Shader!

**_________________________________________________________________________**

My modpack is aiming to make Minecraft more efficient by using **Vulkan** while making your Minecraft experience much better by adding a collection of vanilla plus **mods** and **texture packs** to enhance your minecraft experience while retaining that Vanilla feel!

Hand-picked mods and texture packs that I personally like to play with to enhance my minecraft experience
**_________________________________________________________________________**


!!! Report issue on the discord server

**Vanilla : 167 fps**
![Vanilla fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e72a8bbf2f65b6e4e857df28da7aa519e544fe9_0.webp)
**Sodium : 370 fps**
![Sodium fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280a52d3b08f4e0e4abd21ddd6dc480391f816a1.png)
**Vulkan : 481 fps**
![Vulkan fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f33454d57fe27dd8ed67b3d116b0f7b7eecbdb9.png)
